title: 50 Piece Natural Fir Pine Austriaca Cones Florist Xmas Wreaths Garlands Wedding Christmas
features: Perfect size for your christmas wreaths, garlands and table decorations, ideal for all art and craft projects.
1 kilo excellent quality natural austriaca pine cones (5cm to 8cm)
This pack of long pin cones is perfect for activities, arts and crafts.
Use to make models and decorations or add to displays. Decorate with branch cuttings, pipe cleaners, pom poms and wiggle eyes (not included)
Please note this is a natural product so size and shape may vary. the cone count may vary due to weight.
description: Product description Package Includes:1 x 1KG Natural Fir Pine Austriaca Cones Florist Xmas Wreaths Garlands Wedding Christmas Safety Warning Keep away from open flames and heat sources. Do not use with candles or other open flames.
